title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, January 24 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 24/01/2023
Image reference: 2023-01-24_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-24-2023_img1.png
Bulkers : Bulker values have softened for larger tonnage vessels
Post Panamax BC Dyna Globe (99,300 DWT, Sep 2006, Imabari) sold to unknown Indonesian buyers for USD 15.50 mil, VV Value USD 15.69 mil - BWTS. Handy BC Mireille Selmer (33,700 DWT, May 2010, Samjin Shipbuilding Industries) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 10.70 mil, VV Value USD 11.46 mil - Fwd Dely. Tankers : Tanker values have remained stable, Ice class fitted vessels are achieving high premiums on the S&P market
LR2 Seamagic (116,900 DWT, Mar 2007, Hyundai Heavy Ind) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 47.00 mil, VV Value USD 41.56 mil - BWTS fitted, Ice Class 1A
LR2 Leo (112,800 DWT, Aug 2010, New Times Shipbuilding) sold to Middle Eastern buyers for USD 42.00 mil, VV Value USD 43.65 mil.
